title: Saint Pauloise Guestroom | Mas du Chanoine
description: In the oldest part of the Mas, a master bedroom with a view of the village of Saint-Paul de Vence
paragraphs: This charming guestroom (30 m²) on the first floor is directly accessible via a staircase from the outdoor patio. It is located in the oldest part of the Mas dating from the 17th century and owes its name to the magnificent view it offers of the village of Saint-Paul de Vence.
It was the bedroom of the Canon and successive masters of the house. Furnished in the Provençal tradition with authentic painted furniture, it offers cosy comfort thanks to its oak parquet flooring.

In addition to a King Size bed (180×200), you have two armchairs and a desk. The very spacious and bright bathroom includes a sunken bathtub, a shower and a toilet. It offers a lovely view of the mountains.
subtitle: Charm & Village View
tagline: In the oldest part of the Mas, a master bedroom with a view of the village of Saint-Paul de Vence
